evidence_quotes.quote: to prevent publishers from destroying or removing access to video games that customers have already purchased.

paragraphs.text: I kindly request that the Digital Fairness Act include clear protections to prevent publishers from destroying or removing access to video games that customers have already purchased. I have personally experienced the frustration of losing access to a game I paid for because it was taken down or support was ended. When consumers buy a digital product, they should have a reasonable expectation of continued access, even if the publisher stops selling or updating it. Ensuring this right would protect consumers, preserve digital culture, and prevent unfair practices in the gaming industry.
